variants.title: HiFi Filter OS 5077 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-79708
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter OS 5077 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-79708
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OS 5077 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SAKURA SA-79708. Easy to install and replace, the OS 5077 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AS2388 Air Filter/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-79708
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AS2388 Air Filter/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-79708
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AS2388 air oil separator prevents oil build-up, protects against detonation, and minimizes oil loss which equates to reduced maintenance and more consistent performance.
